title: Laplace Transform: Basics

Session Overview We introduce the Laplace transform. This is an important session which covers both the conceptual and beginning computational aspects of the topic. Fortunately, we have lots of Professor Mattuck’s videos to complement the written exposition. Session Activities Read the course notes:
